Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.customer_type, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.created_by, c1_0.updated_at, c1_0.updated_by, c1_0.customer_number, c1_0.name, c1_0.status, c1_0.tax_id, c1_0.customer_type, c1_1.annual_revenue_amount, c1_1.annual_revenue_currency, c1_1.employee_count, c1_1.industry, c1_1.registration_number, c1_1.website, c1_2.date_of_birth, c1_2.employer_id, c1_2.employment_status, c1_2.nationality, c1_2.place_of_birth, c1_3.annual_turnover_amount, c1_3.annual_turnover_currency, c1_3.business_type, c1_3.industry, c1_3.registration_number, c1_3.years_in_operation from customers c1_0 left join corporate_customer c1_1 on c1_0.id=c1_1.id left join individual_customer c1_2 on c1_0.id=c1_2.id left join smecustomer c1_3 on c1_0.id=c1_3.id where c1_0.customer_number=?
